mnemonics: Mike's Core Principles Tell Everyone: Remember Lessons Learned. (Mnemonic for M-C-P-T-E-R-L-L, representing his focus on Methodologies, Communication, Planning, Teamwork, Efficiency, Risk Management, and Lessons Learned)
keyPoints: Mike Cotterell is a Senior Lecturer at the University of Georgia known for his work in software engineering education.
His teachings emphasize practical, hands-on experience with software development methodologies, particularly Agile and Scrum.
He focuses on the importance of project management principles, team dynamics, and the software development lifecycle (SDLC) in delivering successful projects.
commonMistakes: Confusing Mike Cotterell with other figures in software engineering, like Mike Cohn (a Scrum Alliance founder).
Overlooking the practical application of his teachings by focusing only on the theoretical aspects of project management.
Assuming his module is only about coding and neglecting the critical project management and teamwork components he emphasizes.
